design_philosophy.core_loop: Single-player vs CPU or two-player competitive wrestling matches across multiple rounds with randomized power-ups
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Managing stamina/energy through special move unlocks (energy balls thrown by trainer) while executing wrestling techniques against opponent
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Embodying a powerful wrestler executing signature wrestling moves and special abilities in tag team combat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Endless progression system (officially 255 rounds, then wrapping to round 0) with escalating difficulty through speed increases and time reductions; no traditional narrative arc—pure mechanistic competition loop

difficulty.continues_system: Endless rounds with no explicit failure state documented; match continues until player loses
difficulty.checkpointing: Matches progress round-by-round with difficulty scaling (speed increases, time per round decreases from 30:00 to 10:00 by round 100)
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Two-player mode allows human control of difficulty; single-player faces escalating CPU difficulty through mechanical adjustments rather than AI adaptation

progression.upgrade_system: Energy ball collection system provides temporary special move activation; no persistent character upgrades
progression.unlock_mechanism: Special moves accessible via energy ball pickup during matches; eight playable characters each with unique special move available from start
replayability_hooks: Eight distinct playable characters with individual special moves
Endless round system encouraging score/survival challenges
Difficulty scaling loop (speed/time changes after round 100, wrapping at round 255)

world_building_techniques: Character selection tied to Kinnikuman franchise (Japan) or M.U.S.C.L.E. toy line (North America)
Wrestling match framing provides implicit competitive narrative

environmental_storytelling: Wrestling ring setting with rope mechanics (shove into ropes, rebound attacks)
Trainer character throwing energy balls as neutral game element
